abilities.name: Death's Reach
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for its attack actions from any Remains marker within 8".

abilities.name: Intrepid
abilities.text: When this model starts and ends its activation, it may drain a (soulstone) to heal 3.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Ashwood Coffin
actions.effects: Move the target up to 6". This model may have the target gain a Craven token.

triggers.name: In Another Life
triggers.text: Non-leader only. Select an action on the target. This model declares the selected action.

triggers.name: From the Heavens
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (fortitude) abilities.

triggers.name: Finality
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: Look Upon Your Works
actions.effects: Deal +1 damage to the target for each Remains marker within 3" of it (to a maximum of +3), then remove one Remains marker from within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Duty Eternal
triggers.text: Summon a Death Marshal in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Equilibrium
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Then, all enemies within (aura)1" of the marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Be Gone
triggers.text: One enemy model with a Summon token within the (aura) is killed.
